overview.title: Begin Your Child's Journey Here
overview.description: We welcome students who are eager to learn, grow, and become the best versions of themselves. Bright Future School offers admissions from Pre-Primary through Class 10.
overview.note: Admissions for the current academic year are open. Contact us to confirm seat availability for your child's class.

steps.title: Submit Enquiry
steps.description: Fill out the online enquiry form on our Contact page or visit the school office to express your interest in admission.

steps.title: Campus Visit
steps.description: Schedule a visit to tour our campus, meet our team, and get all your questions answered in person.

steps.title: Collect Admission Form
steps.description: Download the admission form from our Downloads page or collect it directly from the school office.

steps.title: Submit Documents
steps.description: Submit the completed admission form with all required documents as listed below. Originals and photocopies are required.

steps.title: Student Interaction
steps.description: An informal interaction or basic assessment may be scheduled depending on the class applied for. This is a relaxed, friendly process.

steps.title: Fee Payment
steps.description: Pay the admission fee and first-term tuition fee to confirm and secure your child's seat.

steps.title: Admission Confirmed
steps.description: Receive your official admission confirmation letter. Your child is now part of the Bright Future family!

documents.title: Documents Required
documents.note: Please carry original documents along with one photocopy set. Originals will be returned after verification.
items: Aadhaar card copy of the student
2 recent passport-size photographs of the student
Parent / guardian Aadhaar card or government-issued photo ID proof
Address proof (utility bill, rental agreement, or equivalent)
Previous school Transfer Certificate (TC) — if applicable
Previous year's report card / academic records — if applicable
Caste certificate or income certificate — if applicable

eligibility.title: Age Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.note: Age is calculated as on 1st June of the academic year. Please contact the school office to confirm eligibility for your child's specific class.

importantDates.title: Important Dates
importantDates.note: Dates are approximate and subject to revision. Please contact the school office or check this page regularly for confirmed dates.

faq.question: What is the admission procedure at Bright Future School?
faq.answer: Submit an enquiry, visit the campus, collect and fill the admission form, submit required documents, complete any informal interaction, pay fees, and receive your admission confirmation letter.

faq.question: Which classes are open for admission?
faq.answer: We accept admissions from Pre-Primary (Nursery) through Class 10. Seat availability may vary per class and section. Please contact us to check current availability.

faq.question: Is there an entrance test for admission?
faq.answer: For Pre-Primary and lower primary classes, there is no formal entrance test — only a relaxed, informal interaction with the student and parents. For higher classes, a basic academic assessment may be conducted.

faq.question: What is the fee structure?
faq.answer: Please visit our Fee Structure page for indicative fee details. For the confirmed and latest figures, please contact our school office directly, as fees are subject to revision.

faq.question: Does the school provide transport?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a safe school bus service covering major areas. Please contact us for available routes, stops, and transport fee details.

faq.question: What board or curriculum does the school follow?
faq.answer: Please contact the school office for details on our board affiliation and curriculum structure. We will be happy to share all relevant information.

faq.question: Can I visit the school before applying?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We warmly encourage parents to visit our campus. Please call us or fill the enquiry form to schedule a visit at a convenient time.

faq.question: Are sibling discounts or fee concessions available?
faq.answer: Concessions may be available for siblings and certain categories. Please enquire at the school office for details.
